reviews.review_msg: He's the best instructor I met so far he usually shows you how to prove the rules in class. It's a little bit boring but it really help me with further study. Though you might not follow in the class just go through the book ez a+ in the exam.  The only instructor that is better than him is Jamie. They are the best in low-level math courses.
Koopa does go fast in his lectures, but he is great explaining all the topics in detail. He is a very smart professor. Just do his homework and pay attention to his classes, and youll do good.
Honestly ok course I had previous knowledge so it was easy to answer the questions and tests however Dr. Peter was helpful with something's but not all as for computing assignments.

The course lacked structure and clear communication from start to finish. Concepts were not explained thoroughly, and feedback was minimal, making it difficult to understand how to improve. The stress came from confusion rather than the material itself. Overall, I cannot recommend this professor.

Despite putting in significant effort, the lack of organization and transparency made success feel unnecessarily difficult. Instructions were often unclear, and support was limited. This experience was disappointing and discouraging.
Many quizzes and doesn't really explain

Instructor assumes students already know concepts, offers minimal guidance, explanations are rushed. I struggled to understand foundational material because I didn't get step-by-step help which wasted a lot of time as I had to go back and teach it myself!

LISTEN TO ME DONT TAKE ANYTHING WITH HIM!!!
I honestly regret enrolling in this class, the problem isn't with the subject its with the professor, I have never worked this hard to teach myself material I paid to be taught, I would not take another course with this professor under any circumstance, By far the worst educational experience I've had.

He doesn't teach, like at all, there's no clear explanation on anything and you have to figure out everything yourself, which isn't great for someone who already struggles with mathematics. Try to avoid if you're not interested in sleepless nights.
He is a kind and hilarious teacher. I like his teaching method as well. Don't be cheated by the mark he got here!
